title: Republic Act No. 7175
text:
H. No. 18231

REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7175

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE MINGLANILLA DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MINGLANILLA, PROVINCE OF CEBU, FROM FIFTY (50) TO SEVENTY-FIVE (75) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the Minglanilla District Hospital in the Municipality of Minglanilla, Province of Cebu, is hereby increased from fifty (50) to seventy-five (75) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, January 14, 1992

Source: Supreme Court Library
